title: bromus madritensis subsp. delilei
intro: Bromus madritensis subsp. delilei, also known as Spanish brome or Delile's brome, is a type of grass native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its slender stems and feathery inflorescences. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Bromus madritensis subsp. delilei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support digestive health, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and can also be used in herbal salves and creams to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
